title: teucrium rotundifolium var. atlanticum
intro: Teucrium rotundifolium var. atlanticum, also known as Atlantic germander or wood germander, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the western coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective against various health issues. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Teucrium rotundifolium var. atlanticum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
